items.claim: Cody Duran having a full camp would give him an advantage.
items.quote: Cody Duran having a full camp. I'd like to think that that would give him an advantage in this fight

items.claim: Wong Kong's kickboxing is too skilled for Tracy Cortez.
items.quote: I think her kickboxing is just too good. She's too skilled.

items.claim: Adrien Yanz's speed will be too much for Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: I think Adrien Yanz, I think the speed could be a little too much for Cody Garbrand.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt could stifle Adrien Yanz if he uses his wrestling.
items.quote: if Cody could use his wrestling, he could stifle Adrien Yanz

items.claim: The energy and stardom associated with Luke Riley's camp will be an X-factor in his fight against Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: I think there's going to be a lot of energy really rolling into Las Vegas with Luke Riley and Patty Pimble... I think that that that's going to be kind of an X-factor in this fight

items.claim: Gable Steveson is a once-in-a-generation talent.
items.quote: Gable Stefson's a once in a generation type of talent.
